query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "liveedit: towards real-time diffusion-based streaming video editing" computer science
rationale: This paper belongs in the literature review as it addresses the same core mechanism (diffusion-based video editing) and domain (real-time or streaming video editing) as the user's question, satisfying criteria (a) and (b) by providing foundational work on zero-shot video editing using image diffusion models, which is the direct technical precursor to the "LiveEdit" system mentioned.
